info.description: This package provides a REST API to the Ignition Fuel server.
info.title: Ignition Fuel Server REST API

get.description:
Zero or more ElasticSearch configurations may be specified. The
configuration marked as `primary` is the active ElasticSearch server.
get.summary: Get a list of the available ElasticSearch configurations.

post.description: Use this route to tell Fuel about a new ElasticSearch server.

parameters.description: URL address of an Elastic Search server.
parameters.name: address

schema.description: URL address of an Elastic Search server.

parameters.description: "true" to make this configuration the primary config.
parameters.name: primary

schema.description: "true" to make this configuration the primary config.

get.description:
Rebuilding the indices may take several minutes. Use this route when
or if the ElasticSearch indices have become out of date.
get.summary: Rebuilds the primary ElasticSearch indices.
Reconnects to the primary ElasticSearch server.

get.description:
This route will populate the primary ElasticSearch server with new
data contained in the Fuel database. This route may take several
minutes to complete.
get.summary: Updates the primary ElasticSearch servers indices.

delete.description: Use this route to remove and ElasticSearch configuration.

patch.description:
Set the username, password, address, and primary status of an
ElasticSearch server configuration.

parameters.description: URL address of an Elastic Search server.
parameters.name: address

schema.description: URL address of an Elastic Search server.

parameters.description: "true" to make this configuration the primary config.
parameters.name: primary

schema.description: "true" to make this configuration the primary config.

get.description:
Get a list of collections. Collections will be returned paginated,
with pages of 20 items by default. The user can request a
different page with query parameter 'page', and the page size
can be defined with query parameter 'per_page'.
The route supports the 'order' parameter, with values 'asc' and
'desc' (default: desc).
It also supports the 'q' parameter to perform a fulltext search on
name and description.
get.summary: Get list of collections.

post.description:
Creates a new collection. The request body should contain the
following fields: 'name', 'description'. All values as strings.
The collection owner will be retrieved from the passed JWT.

get.description:
Get the list of licenses. Licenses will be returned paginated,
with pages of 20 items by default. The user can request a
different page with query parameter 'page' (first page is value 1).
The page size can be controlled with query parameter 'per_page',
with a maximum of 100 items per page.
get.summary: List licenses

get.description: Returns information about the user associated with the given JWT.
get.summary: Login user

get.description:
Get a list of models. Models will be returned paginated,
with pages of 20 models by default. The user can request a
different page with query parameter 'page', and the page size
can be defined with query parameter 'per_page'.
The route supports the 'order' parameter, with values 'asc' and
'desc' (default: desc).
It also supports the 'q' parameter to perform a fulltext search on models
name, description and tags.
get.summary: Get list of models.

post.description:
Creates a new model. The request body should contain the
following fields: 'modelName', 'urlName', 'description',
'license' (number), 'permission' (number). All values as strings.
'tags': a string containing a comma separated list of tags.
The model owner will be retrieved from the passed JWT.
'file': multiple files in the multipart form.

get.description:
Get a list of reviews. reviews will be returned paginated,
with pages of 20 reviews by default. The user can request a
different page with query parameter 'page', and the page size
can be defined with query parameter 'per_page'.
The route supports the 'order' parameter, with values 'asc' and
'desc' (default: desc).
It also supports the 'q' parameter to perform a fulltext search on reviews
name, description and tags.
get.summary: Get list of reviews for models.

post.summary: Create a new model and a new review.

get.description:
Get the list of organizations. Organizations will be returned paginated,
with pages of 20 organizations by default. The user can request a
different page with query parameter 'page' (first page is value 1).
The page size can be controlled with query parameter 'per_page',
with a maximum of 100 items per page.
get.summary: List organizations

post.description: Creates a new organization. Note: the user identity will be retrieved from the passed JWT.

get.description: Return an organization given its name and a valid JWT.
get.summary: Get an organization

delete.description: Deletes an organization given its name and a valid JWT.

get.description: Return the list of teams of an organization.
get.summary: Get the list of teams of an organization

post.description: Adds a team to an organization.
post.summary: Adds a team to an organization

get.description: Return a team given its organization and team name.
get.summary: Get a single team of an organization

delete.description: Removes a team from an organization

patch.description: Updates a team of an organization

get.description: Return the list of users of an organization.
get.summary: Get the list of users of an organization

post.description: Adds a user to an organization.
post.summary: Adds a user to an organization

delete.description: Removes a user from an organization
delete.summary: Removes a user from an organization

get.description: Get the profile of an owner
get.summary: Get the profile of an owner

get.description: Get the Subt leaderboard.
get.summary: Get the Subt leaderboard.

get.description: Get a list of log files.
get.summary: Get list of Subt log files.

post.description: Creates a new log file submission

get.description: Updates a log file submission (eg. for scoring)
get.summary: Update a log file

patch.description: Updates a log file submission (eg. for scoring)

get.description: Downloads a log file
get.summary: Downloads a log file

get.description: Get a list of participants.
get.summary: Get list of Subt participants.

get.description: Get a list of log files.
get.summary: Get list of Subt log files.

get.description: Get a list of registrations.
get.summary: Get list of Subt registrations.

post.description: Creates a new pending registration for SubT.

delete.description: Deletes a pending registration for SubT.

patch.description: Resolves a pending registration for SubT into Done or Rejected.

get.description:
Returns a paginated list of users,
with pages of 20 users by default. Only system administrators can
access this route. The administrator can request a
different page with query parameter 'page' (first page is value 1).
The page size can be controlled with query parameter 'per_page',
with a maximum of 100 items per page.
get.summary: Get a list of users. Access limited to administrators.

parameters.description: Request a specific page of users.
parameters.name: page

schema.description: Request a specific page of users.

post.description: Creates a new user. Note: the user identity will be retrieved from the passed JWT.

get.description: Return a user given its username and a valid JWT.
get.summary: Get a user

delete.description: Deletes a user given its username and a valid JWT.

patch.description: Updates a user given its username and a valid JWT.

get.summary: Get the acccess tokens for a user.

post.description: Creates an access token for a user.

post.summary: Delete an acccess token that belongs to a user.

get.description:
Get a list of worlds. Worlds will be returned paginated,
with pages of 20 worlds by default. The user can request a
different page with query parameter 'page', and the page size
can be defined with query parameter 'per_page'.
The route supports the 'order' parameter, with values 'asc' and
'desc' (default: desc).
It also supports the 'q' parameter to perform a fulltext search on worlds
name, description and tags.
get.summary: Get list of worlds.

post.description:
Creates a new world. The request body should contain the
following fields: 'name', 'description',
'license' (number), 'permission' (number). All values as strings.
'tags': a string containing a comma separated list of tags.
The worlds owner will be retrieved from the passed JWT.
'file': multiple files in the multipart form.

get.description:
Get a list of collections for the specified owner.
Collections will be returned paginated,
with pages of 20 items by default. The user can request a
different page with query parameter 'page' (first page is value 1).
The page size can be controlled with query parameter 'per_page',
with a maximum of 10belonging0 items per page.
The route supports the 'order' parameter, with values 'asc' and
'desc' (default: desc).
It also supports the 'q' parameter to perform a fulltext search on
name and description.
get.summary: Get owner's collections

get.description: Return a collection given its owner and name.
get.summary: Get a single collection from an owner

delete.description: Deletes a Collection given its owner and name.

post.description: Clones a collection

get.description: Return the list of models that belong to a collection
get.summary: Lists the models of a collection

post.description: Adds a model to a collection
post.summary: Add a model to a collection

delete.description: Removes a model from a Collection

post.description: Transfer a collection

get.description: Return the list of worlds that belong to a collection
get.summary: Lists the worlds of a collection

post.description: Adds a world to a collection
post.summary: Add a world to a collection

delete.description: Removes a world from a Collection

get.summary: Download an individual file from a collection.

get.description:
Get a list of models liked by the specified user.
Models will be returned paginated, with pages of 20 models by default.
The user can request a different page with query parameter 'page' (first page is value 1).
The page size can be controlled with query parameter 'per_page', with a maximum of
100 items per page.
The route supports the 'order' parameter, with values 'asc' and 'desc' (default: desc).
It also supports the 'q' parameter to perform a fulltext search on models name,
description and tags.
get.summary: Get models liked by a user.

get.description:
Get a list of worlds liked by the specified user.
Worlds will be returned paginated, with pages of 20 worlds by default.
The user can request a different page with query parameter 'page' (first page is value 1).
The page size can be controlled with query parameter 'per_page', with a maximum of
100 items per page.
The route supports the 'order' parameter, with values 'asc' and 'desc' (default: desc).
It also supports the 'q' parameter to perform a fulltext search on world's name,
description and tags.
get.summary: Get worlds liked by a user.

get.description:
Get a list of models for the specified owner.
Models will be returned paginated,
with pages of 20 models by default. The user can request a
different page with query parameter 'page' (first page is value 1).
The page size can be controlled with query parameter 'per_page',
with a maximum of 100 items per page.
The route supports the 'order' parameter, with values 'asc' and
'desc' (default: desc).
It also supports the 'q' parameter to perform a fulltext search on models
name, description and tags.
get.summary: Get owner's models

get.description: Return a model zip file given its owner, name, and version.
get.summary: Get a single model zip file from an owner

delete.description: Deletes a model given its owner and name.

post.description: Clones a model.

get.description: List of collections associated to a model.
get.summary: List of collections associated to a model.

post.description: Like a model

post.summary: Create a new review for an existing model.

post.description: Transfer a model

get.description: Return the files information of a given model.
get.summary: Model's file tree.
Download an individual file from a model.

get.description: Return a model zip file given its owner, name, and version.
get.summary: Get a single model zip file from an owner

get.description:
Get a list of worlds for the specified owner.
Worlds will be returned paginated,
with pages of 20 worlds by default. The user can request a
different page with query parameter 'page' (first page is value 1).
The page size can be controlled with query parameter 'per_page',
with a maximum of 100 items per page.
The route supports the 'order' parameter, with values 'asc' and
'desc' (default: desc).
It also supports the 'q' parameter to perform a fulltext search on worlds
name, description and tags.
get.summary: Get owner's worlds

get.description: Return a world given its owner and name.
get.summary: Get a single world from an owner

delete.description: Deletes a world given its owner and name.

post.description: Clones a world.

get.description: List of collections associated to a world.
get.summary: List of collections associated to a world.

post.description: Like a world
Transfer a world

get.description: Return the files information of a given world.
get.summary: World's file tree.
Download an individual file from a world.

get.description: Return a world zip file given its owner, name, and version.
get.summary: Get a single world zip file from an owner

get.description: Return the external models referenced by a world.
get.summary: World's model references.

CreateModel.description: CreateModel encapsulates data required to create a model

owner.description:
Optional Owner of the model. Must be a user or an org.
If not set, the current user will be used as owner

permission.description: The associated permissions. 0 for public, 1 for private models.

tags.description: A comma separated list of tags

ErrMsg.description:
ErrMsg is serialized as JSON, and returned if the request does not succeed
TODO: consider making ErrMsg an 'error'

errid.description: Generated ID for easy tracking in server logs

extra.description: Extra information/arguments associated to Error message.

remote-address.description: Associated request remote address, if applicable

File.title: File represents an open file descriptor.

ModelMetadata.description: ModelMetadata is an array of ModelMetadatum

ModelMetadatum.description:
ModelMetadatum is here so that world and model metadata are stored
in separate tables.

ModelID.description: ModelID is the ID of the resource to which this metadata is attached.

key.description: Key is the string containing the metadata key value.

value.description: Value is the string containing the metadata value associated with the key.

createUserPayload.description: TODO: use this struct to parse and validate input parameters hadler_users.go
createUserPayload.title: CreateUser is used to represent user input in swagger documentation.

fuelError.description: Ign Fuel error serialized as JSON
